# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create a Jenkins Pipeline that downloads build artifacts from external URLs provided as parameters and deploys them to production servers. This allows us to deploy pre-built artifacts from different sources (S3, Artifactory, HTTP servers) without rebuilding.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
  agent any

  options {
    timestamps()
    disableConcurrentBuilds()
    ansiColor('xterm')
    buildDiscarder(logRotator(numToKeepStr: '30'))
    timeout(time: 2, unit: 'HOURS')
  }

  parameters {
    string(name: 'ARTIFACT_URLS', defaultValue: '', description: 'Newline-separated list of artifact URLs (http/https). Example:\nhttps://host/app.tar.gz\nhttps://host/config.zip')
    string(name: 'ARTIFACTORY_URLS', defaultValue: '', description: 'Newline-separated list of Artifactory URLs. Example:\nhttps://artifactory.example.com/artifactory/libs-release-local/app/app-1.2.3.tgz')
    string(name: 'S3_URIS', defaultValue: '', description: 'Newline-separated list of S3 URIs. Example:\ns3://my-bucket/releases/app-1.2.3.tgz')
    choice(name: 'S3_REGION', choices: ['us-east-1','us-east-2','us-west-1','us-west-2','eu-west-1','eu-central-1','ap-southeast-1','ap-southeast-2','ap-northeast-1','ap-northeast-2','sa-east-1'], description: 'AWS region for S3 downloads')
    string(name: 'APP_NAME', defaultValue: 'myapp', description: 'Application name (used for release directory and service name)')
    choice(name: 'DEPLOY_STRATEGY', choices: ['extract', 'copy'], description: 'extract: unpack on server; copy: copy raw artifact file(s) to release dir')
    string(name: 'REMOTE_RELEASES_DIR', defaultValue: '/opt/myapp/releases', description: 'Remote releases directory')
    string(name: 'REMOTE_CURRENT_LINK', defaultValue: '/opt/myapp/current', description: 'Remote symlink path to current release')
    string(name: 'REMOTE_SHARED_DIR', defaultValue: '/opt/myapp/shared', description: 'Remote shared directory (optional use by your app)')
    string(name: 'REMOTE_SERVICE_NAME', defaultValue: 'myapp', description: 'Systemd service name to restart (optional; leave empty to skip restart)')
    text(name: 'PROD_SERVERS', defaultValue: 'prod1.example.com\nprod2.example.com', description: 'Newline-separated list of production servers (hostnames or user@host)')
    booleanParam(name: 'RESTART_SERVICE', defaultValue: true, description: 'Restart service after deploy')
    booleanParam(name: 'HEALTHCHECK_ENABLED', defaultValue: false, description: 'Run health check after deploy')
    string(name: 'HEALTHCHECK_URL', defaultValue: 'http://localhost:8080/health', description: 'Healthcheck URL executed on remote host (curl from server)')
    string(name: 'HEALTHCHECK_TIMEOUT_SEC', defaultValue: '60', description: 'Healthcheck timeout in seconds')
    booleanParam(name: 'DRY_RUN', defaultValue: false, description: 'If true, downloads and stages but does not deploy to servers')
  }

  environment {
    DOWNLOAD_DIR = "${WORKSPACE}/downloads"
    MANIFEST_JSON = "${WORKSPACE}/artifact-manifest.json"
    RELEASE_ID = "${APP_NAME}-${env.BUILD_TAG}".replaceAll('[^A-Za-z0-9_.-]+', '-')
    SSH_OPTS = "-o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o UserKnownHostsFile=/dev/null -o ServerAliveInterval=30 -o ServerAliveCountMax=6"
  }

  stages {
    stage('Validate Inputs') {
      steps {
        script {
          def servers = (params.PROD_SERVERS ?: '').split(/\r?\n/).collect { it.trim() }.findAll { it }
          if (!servers) error("PROD_SERVERS is empty")

          def urls = []
          urls += (params.ARTIFACT_URLS ?: '').split(/\r?\n/).collect { it.trim() }.findAll { it }
          urls += (params.ARTIFACTORY_URLS ?: '').split(/\r?\n/).collect { it.trim() }.findAll { it }
          urls += (params.S3_URIS ?: '').split(/\r?\n/).collect { it.trim() }.findAll { it }

          if (!urls) error("No artifacts specified. Provide ARTIFACT_URLS and/or ARTIFACTORY_URLS and/or S3_URIS.")

          if (params.HEALTHCHECK_ENABLED && !(params.HEALTHCHECK_URL ?: '').trim()) {
            error("HEALTHCHECK_URL must be set when HEALTHCHECK_ENABLED=true")
          }

          if (params.RESTART_SERVICE && !(params.REMOTE_SERVICE_NAME ?: '').trim()) {
            error("REMOTE_SERVICE_NAME must be set when RESTART_SERVICE=true")
          }
        }
      }
    }

    stage('Prepare Workspace') {
      steps {
        sh """
          set -euo pipefail
          rm -rf '${DOWNLOAD_DIR}'
          mkdir -p '${DOWNLOAD_DIR}'
        """
      }
    }

    stage('Download Artifacts') {
      steps {
        script {
          def artifacts = []

          def httpUrls = (params.ARTIFACT_URLS ?: '').split(/\r?\n/).collect { it.trim() }.findAll { it }
          def artifactoryUrls = (params.ARTIFACTORY_URLS ?: '').split(/\r?\n/).collect { it.trim() }.findAll { it }
          def s3Uris = (params.S3_URIS ?: '').split(/\r?\n/).collect { it.trim() }.findAll { it }

          def downloadHttp = { String url ->
            def base = url.tokenize('/')[-1]
            if (!base) base = "artifact"
            def file = "${env.DOWNLOAD_DIR}/${base}"
            sh """
              set -euo pipefail
              curl -fL --retry 5 --retry-delay 2 --connect-timeout 15 --max-time 1800 -o '${file}' '${url}'
            """
            return [source: url, type: 'http', filename: base, path: file]
          }

          def downloadArtifactory = { String url ->
            def base = url.tokenize('/')[-1]
            if (!base) base = "artifact"
            def file = "${env.DOWNLOAD_DIR}/${base}"
            withCredentials([usernamePassword(credentialsId: 'artifactory-creds', usernameVariable: 'ART_USER', passwordVariable: 'ART_PASS')]) {
              sh """
                set -euo pipefail
                curl -fL --retry 5 --retry-delay 2 --connect-timeout 15 --max-time 1800 -u "$ART_USER:$ART_PASS" -o '${file}' '${url}'
              """
            }
            return [source: url, type: 'artifactory', filename: base, path: file]
          }

          def downloadS3 = { String uri ->
            def base = uri.tokenize('/')[-1]
            if (!base) base = "artifact"
            def file = "${env.DOWNLOAD_DIR}/${base}"
            withCredentials([[$class: 'AmazonWebServicesCredentialsBinding', credentialsId: 'aws-creds']]) {
              sh """
                set -euo pipefail
                aws --region '${params.S3_REGION}' s3 cp '${uri}' '${file}'
              """
            }
            return [source: uri, type: 's3', filename: base, path: file]
          }

          httpUrls.each { artifacts << downloadHttp(it) }
          artifactoryUrls.each { artifacts << downloadArtifactory(it) }
          s3Uris.each { artifacts << downloadS3(it) }

          artifacts.each { a ->
            a.sha256 = sh(script: "set -euo pipefail; sha256sum '${a.path}' | awk '{print \$1}'", returnStdout: true).trim()
            a.sizeBytes = sh(script: "set -euo pipefail; wc -c < '${a.path}' | tr -d ' '", returnStdout: true).trim()
          }

          writeFile file: env.MANIFEST_JSON, text: groovy.json.JsonOutput.prettyPrint(groovy.json.JsonOutput.toJson([
            app: params.APP_NAME,
            build: env.BUILD_TAG,
            releaseId: env.RELEASE_ID,
            createdAt: new Date().format("yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ssXXX"),
            artifacts: artifacts.collect { [source: it.source, type: it.type, filename: it.filename, sha256: it.sha256, sizeBytes: it.sizeBytes] }
          ]))
        }
      }
    }

    stage('Verify Downloads') {
      steps {
        sh """
          set -euo pipefail
          ls -lah '${DOWNLOAD_DIR}'
          test -s '${MANIFEST_JSON}'
          cat '${MANIFEST_JSON}'
        """
      }
    }

    stage('Deploy to Production') {
      when { expression { return !params.DRY_RUN } }
      steps {
        script {
          def servers = (params.PROD_SERVERS ?: '').split(/\r?\n/).collect { it.trim() }.findAll { it }
          def files = sh(script: "set -euo pipefail; ls -1 '${DOWNLOAD_DIR}'", returnStdout: true).trim().split(/\r?\n/).collect { it.trim() }.findAll { it }

          def remoteReleaseDir = "${params.REMOTE_RELEASES_DIR}/${env.RELEASE_ID}"

          def deployOne = { String host ->
            sh """
              set -euo pipefail
              ssh ${env.SSH_OPTS} '${host}' '
                set -euo pipefail
                sudo mkdir -p "${params.REMOTE_RELEASES_DIR}" "${params.REMOTE_SHARED_DIR}"
                sudo mkdir -p "${remoteReleaseDir}"
                sudo chown -R "\$USER":"\$USER" "${remoteReleaseDir}" || true
              '
            """

            files.each { f ->
              sh """
                set -euo pipefail
                scp ${env.SSH_OPTS} '${DOWNLOAD_DIR}/${f}' '${host}:"${remoteReleaseDir}/${f}"'
              """
            }

            sh """
              set -euo pipefail
              scp ${env.SSH_OPTS} '${MANIFEST_JSON}' '${host}:"${remoteReleaseDir}/artifact-manifest.json"'
            """

            if (params.DEPLOY_STRATEGY == 'extract') {
              sh """
                set -euo pipefail
                ssh ${env.SSH_OPTS} '${host}' '
                  set -euo pipefail
                  cd "${remoteReleaseDir}"
                  for f in *; do
                    [ -f "\$f" ] || continue
                    case "\$f" in
                      *.tar.gz|*.tgz)  tar -xzf "\$f" ;;
                      *.tar.bz2)       tar -xjf "\$f" ;;
                      *.tar.xz)        tar -xJf "\$f" ;;
                      *.zip)           unzip -oq "\$f" ;;
                      *)               : ;;
                    esac
                  done
                '
              """
            }

            sh """
              set -euo pipefail
              ssh ${env.SSH_OPTS} '${host}' '
                set -euo pipefail
                sudo ln -sfn "${remoteReleaseDir}" "${params.REMOTE_CURRENT_LINK}"
              '
            """

            if (params.RESTART_SERVICE) {
              sh """
                set -euo pipefail
                ssh ${env.SSH_OPTS} '${host}' '
                  set -euo pipefail
                  sudo systemctl daemon-reload || true
                  sudo systemctl restart "${params.REMOTE_SERVICE_NAME}"
                  sudo systemctl is-active --quiet "${params.REMOTE_SERVICE_NAME}"
                '
              """
            }

            if (params.HEALTHCHECK_ENABLED) {
              sh """
                set -euo pipefail
                ssh ${env.SSH_OPTS} '${host}' '
                  set -euo pipefail
                  timeout ${params.HEALTHCHECK_TIMEOUT_SEC}s bash -lc "
                    end=\\$((SECONDS+${params.HEALTHCHECK_TIMEOUT_SEC}))
                    while [ \\$SECONDS -lt \\$end ]; do
                      if curl -fsS '${params.HEALTHCHECK_URL}' >/dev/null; then
                        exit 0
                      fi
                      sleep 2
                    done
                    exit 1
                  "
                '
              """
            }
          }

          def branches = [:]
          servers.each { s ->
            branches["deploy-${s}"] = { deployOne(s) }
          }
          parallel branches
        }
      }
    }
  }

  post {
    always {
      archiveArtifacts artifacts: 'artifact-manifest.json,downloads/*', fingerprint: true, onlyIfSuccessful: false
      cleanWs deleteDirs: true, notFailBuild: true
    }
  }
}
